title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
author: Significant-Gravitas
raw_description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 是一个开源项目，旨在提供人人可用的自主 AI 代理，基于 LLM 实现任务自动化，支持多种模型和 API。
analysis_note: 顶级 AI 代理框架，高星标和广泛生态，核心亮点是自主任务执行和多模型支持。
